org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.MarshalledNode

Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections
Collections classes.

  • Uses of MarshalledNode in org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections that return MarshalledNode
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MarshalledNode
    MarshalledNode.add(Object value)
    Appends a value on an array node, mutating the backing List in place.
    static MarshalledNode
    MarshalledNode.arrayNode()
    Creates a new array node backed by a new empty JsonList.
    MarshalledNode
    MarshalledList.at(String pointer)
    Returns the node addressed by the specified RFC 6901 JSON Pointer relative to this list.
    MarshalledNode
    MarshalledMap.at(String pointer)
    Returns the node addressed by the specified RFC 6901 JSON Pointer relative to this map.
    MarshalledNode
    MarshalledNode.at(String pointer)
    Returns the node addressed by the specified RFC 6901 JSON Pointer relative to this node's backing value.
    MarshalledNode
    MarshalledNode.copy()
    Returns a new node backed by a deep copy of this node's backing value.
    MarshalledNode
    MarshalledNode.get(int index)
    Returns the element node at the specified index on an array node.
    MarshalledNode
    MarshalledNode.get(String name)
    Returns the child node for the specified key on an object node.
    static MarshalledNode
    MarshalledNode.objectNode()
    Creates a new object node backed by a new empty JsonMap.
    static MarshalledNode
    MarshalledNode.of(Object value)
    Wraps any value as a node.
    MarshalledNode
    MarshalledNode.put(String name, Object value)
    Adds or replaces an entry on an object node, mutating the backing Map in place.
    MarshalledNode
    MarshalledNode.set(String pointer, Object value)
    Writes the specified value at the location addressed by the specified RFC 6901 JSON Pointer, mutating the backing container in place and auto-vivifying missing intermediate containers.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<MarshalledNode>
    MarshalledNode.find(String pointer)
